what_stands_out: A clear divide exists between those who value the flexibility provided and those who feel overwhelmed by the intensity of the workload.
The presence of both growth opportunities and stagnation signals suggests inconsistent career development experiences across different roles.
Systemic issues, such as IT delays and frequent process changes, appear to contribute significantly to employee frustration.
